subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Holy Court. God willing, mayest thou, at all times, drink from the chalices of divine knowledge of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بساحت اقدس فائز انشاء الله در کل احیان از کئوس عرفان نفس رحمن بیاشامید
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
